assertion_results.text: Output must score at least three areas at 4/5 or higher
assertion_results.evidence: 6 of 6 areas scored 4/5 or higher: CI/CD 5/5, Testing 4/5, Code review 4/5, Monitoring 5/5, Developer Experience 5/5, Ownership & culture 4/5.

assertion_results.text: Output must not recommend tooling the team already has (e.g. Datadog, feature flags, SLOs)
assertion_results.evidence: No recommendation to adopt Datadog, feature flags, or SLOs. Recommendations cover Conventional Commits, TypeScript strict mode, OpenAPI specs, and a feature flag lifecycle *policy* (not the tool itself).

assertion_results.text: Output must give at least one non-trivial medium- or long-term recommendation
assertion_results.evidence: Long term: 'Grow integration test count toward a 1:4 ratio with unit tests (target ~525); prioritise Supabase RLS and API boundary tests.' Medium term: 'Document OpenAPI specs for any external-facing APIs; validate them against implementation in CI.'

assertion_results.text: Output must acknowledge the low incident rate of 0.1 P1/month
assertion_results.evidence: The report does not cite '0.1 P1/month' or '0.1 P1 per month' verbatim. Monitoring is scored 5/5 with '12-min MTTR' noted, but the specific incident rate metric is absent. Same failure as iterations 2 and 3.

assertion_results.text: Output must include at least one improvement item
assertion_results.evidence: Multiple improvement items: 'Audit integration test coverage', 'Grow integration test count to ~525', 'Run a structured DX survey', 'Define a feature flag lifecycle policy', etc.
